text:
was a member of the Scout Regiment and the of Marlene Squad during the mission to reclaim Wall Maria.

Appearance

Marlene was a woman of average height and build, and had shoulder-length blonde hair with bright eyes. When not wearing the Scout Regiment's typical uniform, her attire consisted of a white button-up shirt, dark pants, and an overcoat.

Personality

Not much was known about her personality, but she was shown to be a somewhat cheerful person, as evidenced by her taunting Hange Zoë after a meeting.

Story

Royal Government arc

Marlene is seen attending a meeting with Erwin Smith and the rest of the Scout Regiment's officers to discuss the recent revelations about Eren Jaeger's father Grisha. As the officers leave the meeting, she teases Hange about their past infatuation with Keith Sadies.

Later on, Marlene is seen with her fellow leaders watching as the scouts fight each other over the meat that is being served in celebration for their next mission.

On the day of the operation, Marlene and the other high-ranking scouts give salute to the leaders of the other branches before heading out into Wall Maria.

Return to Shiganshina arc

After the scouts successfully seal the hole in Wall Maria they are attacked by the Beast Titan and its forces. Erwin orders Marlene and Dirk's teams to meet up with Klaus's team to protect the scouts' horses. During the fighting, however, Marlene and her team are killed by the Beast Titan, which starts throwing crushed boulders at them, ripping them all to pieces.

Legacy

War for Paradis arc

When Hange decides to oppose Eren's plan to destroy the world beyond the Walls, Marlene is one of the soldiers remembered while Hange tries to convince Jean and Mikasa that their fallen comrades would not support destroying the world.

Relationships

Hange Zoë - Marlene and Hange had a close relationship with each other, and were seemingly old acquaintances. She seemed to take pleasure in teasing Hange and giving them a hard time.

Trivia

Marlene and Ramzi share the same Japanese voice actress.
